heading: Short title
label: 91 Short title
text: For convenience of reference, this chapter may be designated and cited as “The Naval Stores Act.”
notes: Effective Date, , provided:Act Mar. 3, 1923, ch. 217, § 1042 Stat. 1437“That this Act [enacting this chapter] shall become effective at the expiration of ninety days next after the date of its approval [].”Mar. 23, 1923
amendments: Effective Date, , provided:Act Mar. 3, 1923, ch. 217, § 1042 Stat. 1437“That this Act [enacting this chapter] shall become effective at the expiration of ninety days next after the date of its approval [].”Mar. 23, 1923
